framework_name: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 Moderate Baseline (sample subset)
source: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 (paraphrased subset for bootstrapping). Replace with the full usnistgov/oscal-content moderate baseline JSON in production.

controls.title: Account Management
controls.description: Manage system accounts, including establishing, activating, modifying, reviewing, disabling, and removing accounts. Specify authorized users, group and role membership, and access authorizations for each account.

controls.title: Access Enforcement
controls.description: Enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources in accordance with applicable access control policies.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.description: Employ the principle of least privilege, allowing only authorized accesses for users (or processes acting on behalf of users) which are necessary to accomplish assigned organizational tasks.

controls.title: Event Logging
controls.description: Identify the types of events that the system is capable of logging in support of the audit function. Coordinate the event logging function with other organizational entities requiring audit-related information.

controls.title: Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
controls.description: Review and analyze system audit records for indications of inappropriate or unusual activity and report findings to designated personnel.

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.description: Develop, document, and maintain under configuration control, a current baseline configuration of the system.

controls.title: Configuration Settings
controls.description: Establish and document configuration settings for components employed within the system that reflect the most restrictive mode consistent with operational requirements.

controls.title: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
controls.description: Uniquely identify and authenticate organizational users and associate that unique identification with processes acting on behalf of those users.

controls.title: Authenticator Management
controls.description: Manage system authenticators by verifying identity, establishing initial authenticator content, and protecting authenticator content from unauthorized disclosure or modification.

controls.title: Incident Handling
controls.description: Implement an incident handling capability for incidents that includes preparation, detection and analysis, containment, eradication, and recovery.

controls.title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
controls.description: Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities in the system and hosted applications and when new vulnerabilities potentially affecting the system are identified and reported.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.description: Monitor and control communications at the external managed interfaces to the system and at key internal managed interfaces within the system.

controls.title: Cryptographic Protection
controls.description: Determine the cryptographic uses and types of cryptography required for each use; and implement the cryptographic uses and types in accordance with applicable federal laws, executive orders, directives, regulations, policies, standards, and guidelines.

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest using cryptographic mechanisms or alternative physical controls.

controls.title: Flaw Remediation
controls.description: Identify, report, and correct system flaws. Test software and firmware updates related to flaw remediation for effectiveness and potential side effects before installation.

controls.title: System Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor the system to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks and unauthorized local, network, and remote connections.
